content.text: There are currently 13 unique Achievements for Schedule 1 on Steam.

To take down the cartel, you must choose to go hostile with the cartel and unlock Uptown. After unlocking the Uptown region and progressing to the next day, you will get a quest named "Finishing the Job". For this quest to start, you will have to talk to Uncle Nelson at a payphone, just like most quests in this game. Uncle Nelson will tell you to get RDX from Billy Kramer, Talk to Sam Thompson to dig a tunnel under the Hyland Manor, and give the RDX to Stan Carney so he could turn the RDX into a bomb.  To get the RDX, you must give 20x Moderate quality cocaine to Billy in packaged form. You can use baggies, jars, or a brick to do the deal. After that, you can pay Sam 10,000 dollars in cash to dig a tunnel overnight. Then, you must talk to Stan so you could obtain the final item you need, which is the bomb. Stan will tell you to kill the person who keeps stealing supplies from his shipping container. The person, named "Stranger" in game, will come out of the building with weed graffiti located in Docks at night. Once you kill him (Knocking him out with a bat or a frying pan will not count), Stan will turn the RDX into a bomb. After obtaining the bomb and getting Sam to dig a tunnel under the manor, you can now go into the tunnel to rig the bomb. After the bomb blows up the manor, you get this achievement.

rows.How to complete: Complete the “Welcome to Hyland Point” tasks in your journal.

rows.Description: Manufacture a product worth at least $100.
rows.How to complete: Finish mixing a Product that’s worth a minimum of $100.

Recruit a dealer for the first time. Benji is the first dealer you’ll be able to hire. Keep selling your products, and you’ll eventually get a call from Uncle Nelson about hiring Benji. You can find him in Motel Room 2, and he costs $500 to hire.
Finish the game’s prologue.

rows.Achievement: The Long Arm of the Law
rows.How to complete: Get arrested by the Police for whatever shady things you may or may not be doing.

rows.Description: Sell something to a customer, then pickpocket it back.
rows.How to complete: After selling your goods to a customer, you need to play the Pickpocketing mini-game to steal the item back from them.
Buy yourself a Golden Skateboard from Shred Shack near the Hardware store for $1,500.
Have cash and inventory worth a total of $100,000.

rows.Description: Dispose of 500 pieces of trash at the Cash for Trash machines.
rows.How to complete: While playing, head to any of the Cash for Trash machines in the game and throw away a total of 500 pieces of trash.
Have cash and inventory worth a total of $1,000,000.
Have cash and inventory worth a total of $10,000,000.

rows.Description: Graffiti 25 surfaces in a single save.
rows.How to complete: Buy 25 graffiti cans from the gas mart for $250 total, Start graffitiing everywhere.

WARNING: Contains spoilers.

lists.text:
Schedule I and the developers have actually received a small amount of backlash for the "Indian Dealer" achievement because of the racist-sounding name and nature of the achievement.
However, the achievement itself does not intend to dwell on any racism or discrimination, and the meaning of the achievement has been most likely massively misunderstood.
